System Dependencies

Name Usage Description
Debian
OpenEmbedded
macOS
RHEL
Ubuntu
libann-dev 1 Approximate Nearest Neighbor Searching library (development files)
libao-dev 0 Cross Platform Audio Output Library Development
libapache2-mod-python 2 Python-embedding module for Apache 2
libargtable2-dev 0 Library for parsing GNU style command line arguments (development headers)
libaria 5
libasound2-dev 5 shared library for ALSA applications -- development files
libatomic 5 support library providing __atomic built-in functions
libav 4
libavahi-client-dev 6 Development files for the Avahi client library
libavahi-core-dev 6 Development files for Avahi's embeddable mDNS/DNS-SD library
libavdevice-dev 4 FFmpeg library for handling input and output devices - development files
libb64-dev 0 base64 encoding/decoding library - development files
libbackward-cpp-dev 0 Beautiful stack trace pretty printer for C++
libbdd-dev 0 Binary decision-diagram library (development)
libbison-dev 0 YACC-compatible parser generator - development library
libblas-dev 8 Basic Linear Algebra Subroutines 3, static library
libblosc-dev 3 high performance meta-compressor optimized for binary data (development files)
libbluetooth 6 Library to use the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth stack
libbluetooth-dev 7 Development files for using the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth library
libboost-atomic 0 atomic data types, operations, and memory ordering constraints
libboost-atomic-dev 2 atomic data types, operations, and memory ordering constraints (default version)
libboost-chrono 0 C++ representation of time duration, time point, and clocks
libboost-chrono-dev 8 C++ representation of time duration, time point, and clocks (default version)
libboost-coroutine 2 provides a sort of cooperative multitasking on a single thread
libboost-coroutine-dev 2 provides a sort of cooperative multitasking on a single thread (default version)
libboost-date-time 6 set of date-time libraries based on generic programming concepts
libboost-date-time-dev 10 set of date-time libraries based on generic programming concepts (default version)
libboost-dev 12 Boost C++ Libraries development files (default version)
libboost-filesystem 7 filesystem operations (portable paths, iteration over directories, etc) in C++
libboost-filesystem-dev 10 filesystem operations (portable paths, iteration over directories, etc) in C++ (default version)
libboost-iostreams 0 Boost.Iostreams Library
libboost-iostreams-dev 10 Boost.Iostreams Library development files (default version)
libboost-math 0 Boost.Math Library
libboost-math-dev 0 Boost.Math Library development files (default version)
libboost-numpy-dev 0 Boost.Python NumPy extensions development files (default version)
libboost-program-options 7 program options library for C++
libboost-program-options-dev 12 program options library for C++ (default version)
libboost-python 6 Boost.Python Library
libboost-python-dev 12 Boost.Python Library development files (default version)
libboost-random 6 Boost Random Number Library
libboost-random-dev 6 Boost Random Number Library (default version)
libboost-regex 0 regular expression library for C++
libboost-regex-dev 6 regular expression library for C++ (default version)
libboost-serialization 1 serialization library for C++
libboost-serialization-dev 5 serialization library for C++ (default version)
libboost-system 1 Operating system (e.g. diagnostics support) library
libboost-system-dev 11 Operating system (e.g. diagnostics support) library (default version)
libboost-thread 9 portable C++ multi-threading
libboost-thread-dev 10 portable C++ multi-threading (default version)
libboost-timer 0 C++ wall clock and CPU process timers
libboost-timer-dev 4 C++ wall clock and CPU process timers (default version)
libbsd-dev 0 utility functions from BSD systems - development files
libcairo2-dev 17 Development files for the Cairo 2D graphics library
libcap-dev 8 POSIX 1003.1e capabilities (development)
libcap-ng-dev 0 Development and header files for libcap-ng
libcap-ng0 0 alternate POSIX capabilities library
libcap2 0 POSIX 1003.1e capabilities (library)
libcap2-bin 0 POSIX 1003.1e capabilities (utilities)
libccd-dev 9 Library for collision detection between convex shapes - dev files
libccid 0 PC/SC driver for USB CCID smart card readers
libcdd-dev 0 Library for finding vertices of convex polytopes, development
libcegui-mk2-dev 0 Crazy Eddie's GUI (development files)
libcereal-dev 0 C++11 library for serialization
libceres-dev 16 nonlinear least squares minimizer (development files)
libcgroup-dev 0 control and monitor control groups (development)
libclang-dev 7 clang library - Development package
libcoin60-dev 0
libcoin80-dev 1
libconfig++-dev 0 parsing/manipulation of structured config files (C++ development)
libconfig-dev 0 parsing/manipulation of structured config files (development)
libconsole-bridge-dev 16 console bridge - development files
libcos4-dev 0 omniORB CORBA services stubs development files
libcpp-httplib-dev 0
libcpprest-dev 0
libcunit-dev 4 Unit Testing Library for C -- development files
libcurl 4 easy-to-use client-side URL transfer library (OpenSSL flavour)
libcurl-dev 6 development files and documentation for libcurl (OpenSSL flavour)
libdbus-dev 5 simple interprocess messaging system (development headers)
libdc1394-dev 4
libdevil-dev 3 Cross-platform image loading and manipulation toolkit
libdlib-dev 1 C++ toolkit for machine learning and computer vision - development
libdmtx-dev 7 Data Matrix barcodes (development files and static libraries)
libdpkg-dev 0 Debian package management static library
libdraco-dev 4 Library for compressing 3D geometric meshes and point clouds (headers)
libdrm-dev 0 Userspace interface to kernel DRM services -- development files
libdw-dev 9 libdw1 development libraries and header files
libdxflib-dev 3 Development files for the dxflib library
libedit 0 BSD editline and history libraries
libedit-dev 0 BSD editline and history libraries (development files)
libepoxy-dev 3 OpenGL function pointer management library- development
libesd0-dev 1
libespeak-dev 1 virtual package provided by libespeak-ng-libespeak-dev
libespeak-ng1 0 Multi-lingual software speech synthesizer: shared library
libestools-dev 1
libev-dev 0 static library, header files, and docs for libev
libevdev-dev 0 wrapper library for evdev devices - development files
libevent-dev 0 Asynchronous event notification library (development files)
libexif 0 library to parse EXIF files
libexif-dev 0 library to parse EXIF files (development files)
libexiv2-dev 0 EXIF/IPTC/XMP metadata manipulation library - development files
libexpat1-dev 0 XML parsing C library - development kit
libext2fs-dev 0 ext2/ext3/ext4 file system libraries - headers and static libraries
libfcl 6
libfcl-dev 10 Flexible Collision Library - development files
libffi-dev 7 Foreign Function Interface library (development files)
libfftw3 5 Library for computing Fast Fourier Transforms - development
libfl-dev 0 static library for flex (a fast lexical analyzer generator)
libflann 1
libflann-dev 9 Fast Library for Approximate Nearest Neighbors - development
libflatbuffers-dev 0 efficient cross platform serialization library - development files

libfontconfig1-dev 0 virtual package provided by libfontconfig-dev
